title: Public export SDMMC0 IRQ cross-check
scope: audit only; do not rewrite or submit patches yet

finding.issue: public U-Boot and the current Linux export disagree on SDMMC0 IRQ number
evidence: Current public export uses interrupts = <GIC_SPI 161 IRQ_TYPE_LEVEL_HIGH> for mmc@4020000.
Public U-Boot DTS uses interrupts = <GIC_SPI 40 IRQ_TYPE_LEVEL_HIGH> for mmc@4020000.
H035 tested IRQ 40 and it regressed before card init completion.
finding.decision: Do not change the export to IRQ 40 based only on public U-Boot. Require new source evidence explaining the interrupt mapping before any IRQ change.

next_action: Keep IRQ 161 in the next clean export unless a maintainer/vendor/source reply supplies a corrected mapping.
